update_history.notes: Initial population from freezone-pricing-research.md and mainland-pricing-research.md

trading.notes: Standard Trading/Service license. General Trading is 50,265 AED.

general_trading.notes: General Trading license — significantly higher than standard

flexi_desk.notes: Standard flexi desk, up to 3 visas. Range 15,000–16,800.

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

pros: World's #1 free zone — strong international reputation
cons: Higher license fees than budget-friendly zones
General Trading license significantly more expensive (50,265 AED)
Activity amendment fees (1,515 AED per request)

trading.notes: Typical package cost 11,900–14,900 AED. No difference between activity types.

employment_visa.notes: Total per visa 3,800–4,800. Includes establishment card, entry permit, status change, medical, EID, stamping.

flexi_desk.notes: Included in base license package — no physical office required

registration_fee.notes: Included in license package — name reservation, approvals, MOA, share certs all included

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

packages.name: Standard Package
packages.note: Base package — no physical office required

pros: Very cost-effective — among lowest license fees

trading.notes: Biz Starter Package (zero visa). General range 6,000–15,000.

services.notes: No cost difference between activity types at base level

formation_package.notes: Portal 360 digital setup — no PRO needed

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

pros: Among the lowest license fees in UAE (from 6,000 AED)
cons: Located in Ras Al Khaimah (not Dubai)
Visa costs higher than some competitors (4,000–7,000)

trading.notes: Annual license fee. Total minimum package 10,800 AED.

employment_visa.notes: Range 10,000–15,000 AED per additional visa. Higher than most free zones.

flexi_desk.notes: Annual service charges 3,000 AED. Flexi/basic included in packages.

physical_office.notes: Full setup with office 25,000–40,000 AED Year 1

share_capital.notes: Minimum capital for FZE/FZC, payable within first year. May be refundable.

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

pros: Fast license issuance (as fast as 1 working day)
cons: Higher visa costs than competitors (10,000–15,000 per visa)

employment_visa.notes: For applicants already in UAE. Outside UAE: 3,260 AED.

flexi_desk.notes: No flexi-desk option — physical office mandatory

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

cons: Physical office mandatory — no flexi-desk option
Higher total setup cost (50,000+ AED minimum)
Visa deposit required (2,500 AED per visa)

services.notes: Non-regulated: 10,000–50,000+ AED. Using midpoint. Highly variable.

technology.notes: Tech promotions from Creative Zone: USD 1,500/year for 5 years

financial_services.notes: DFSA approval USD 15,000–70,000. Highly variable by regulation category.

flexi_desk.notes: No flexi-desk commonly available at DIFC

coworking.notes: Co-working subsidies from Creative Zone: USD 500/month

physical_office.notes: Major cost component. Varies significantly by size and floor.

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

pros: Best for financial services, fintech, legal, consulting
cons: Highest setup costs among UAE free zones
Regulated activities require DFSA approval (4–6 months)
Office space is the major cost driver
Vague/variable pricing — hard to estimate accurately
Not suitable for trading or e-commerce

services.notes: Non-Financial: USD 5,000–5,500 initial, USD 5,000 annual. Using USD 5,250 ≈ 19,270 AED rounded.

financial_services.notes: Financial: USD 16,700–20,000 initial. Using USD 16,700 ≈ 61,330 AED rounded.

employment_visa.notes: Not specified in ADGM sources. Using standard UAE estimate.

physical_office.notes: USD 40–60/sq ft annually. Using ~200 sq ft at USD 50 = USD 10,000 ≈ 36,700 AED. Larger offices much more.

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

cons: Office space at premium market rates

services.notes: Service package — includes 1 visa. ~2,600 AED more than trading.

employment_visa.notes: Estimated 3,500–5,000 AED per additional visa. 1 visa included in trading/service packages.

registration_fee.notes: Included in packages — commercial registry, MOA, incorporation cert all included

formation_package.notes: All-inclusive packages — no separate PRO needed

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

pros: Pioneer package for young entrepreneurs (20–30 age)
Flexible payment plans (2, 3, or 6 month installments)
cons: Service license is pricier than trading (16,135 vs 13,535)
Limited prestige compared to Dubai zones

trading.notes: Basic/Standard package — up to 3 activities, 0 visas, flexi-desk included

employment_visa.notes: Calculated from package differences: (14,350 - 12,500) = 1,850 per visa bundled

medical_fitness.notes: Likely included in bundled visa price

emirates_id.notes: Likely included in bundled visa price

flexi_desk.notes: Included in all packages at no additional cost

physical_office.notes: Optional add-on — pricing not detailed in sources

formation_package.notes: All-inclusive packages — no separate PRO needed

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

pros: Supports wide range of activities including media and holding

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder. Basic plan starts ~AED 1,000; comprehensive ~AED 2,000+.

corporate_tax_compliance.notes: Audit + tax filing. Applies if revenue > AED 375K. Year 2+ cost.

pros: Ideal for media, content creators, freelancers
cons: Less comprehensive activity support than larger zones

commercial.notes: Commercial license (General Trading): 10,000–35,000 AED. Using 15,000 as representative.

ecommerce_trader.notes: E-commerce Trader License — includes knowledge/innovation fees. For small-scale online businesses.

ecommerce.notes: Full commercial e-commerce license. For small-scale, use ecommerce_trader at 1,070.

general_trading.notes: General Trading — higher end of commercial range

employment_visa.notes: Total per person 3,000–7,500 AED. Includes work permit, entry, medical, EID, stamping.

flexi_desk.notes: Ejari-compliant flexi-desk/virtual office: 5,000–10,000 AED. Limited visa quota.

trade_name_reservation.notes: Standard Arabic/English name. Foreign names: 2,000 AED.

market_fees.notes: 2.5% of annual office rent — calculated dynamically

annual_fee.notes: Administrative LSA only. Not needed for most activities under 100% foreign ownership.

local_service_agent.required_activities: Only for specific strategic sectors (Oil & Gas, Banking, Telecoms, Defense, Fishing, Commercial Agencies)

health_insurance.notes: Mandatory health insurance per visa holder.

pros: Direct access to entire UAE local market
No customs duty on local sales (vs. 5% from free zone)
E-commerce Trader license from just 1,070 AED
cons: Higher overall setup and renewal costs
LSA may be needed for some activities (8,000 AED/year)

health_insurance_per_person.notes: Mandatory in UAE. Employer-provided for employees.

bank_account_minimum_balance.notes: Varies by bank. Some accounts charge monthly fee instead (e.g., 249 AED/month).

accounting_annual.notes: Mandatory for mainland. Recommended for free zones.

vat_registration.notes: Free to register. Required if revenue exceeds 375,000 AED. Advisory fees: 2,000–5,000 AED.

vat_filing_annual.notes: If VAT registered. Can self-file for free via FTA portal.

amendment_fees.notes: For adding/changing activities, document modifications, etc.
